events.title: Free Blood Pressure & Diabetes Screening
events.description: Join us for a free community health screening open to all residents of Ekwendeni and surrounding areas. Our clinical staff will conduct blood pressure checks and blood glucose testing. No appointment needed. Please fast for at least 6 hours before attending for accurate glucose results.
events.location: OPD Main Entrance, Ekwendeni Mission Hospital

events.title: Maternal Health Awareness Day
events.description: A community event focused on maternal and newborn health. Presentations on safe delivery practices, antenatal care, and nutrition during pregnancy. Traditional birth attendants and community health workers are especially welcome. Refreshments provided.
events.location: Hospital Conference Hall, Ekwendeni Mission Hospital

events.title: Community Health Worker Training
events.description: Three-day refresher training for registered Community Health Workers (CHWs) in Mzimba District. Topics include malaria case management, malnutrition screening, and referral protocols. Attendance is mandatory for all active CHWs in the catchment area. Accommodation available on request.

events.title: Annual Hospital Fundraising Dinner
events.description: Our annual fundraising dinner supporting equipment upgrades for the surgical ward. Tickets available from the hospital administration office. All proceeds go directly to patient care. Formal attire requested. Limited seats available.

events.title: World Health Day Community Walk
events.description: Ekwendeni Mission Hospital joined communities across Malawi in marking World Health Day with a 5km community walk through Ekwendeni town. Staff, patients, and community members participated in raising awareness around healthy lifestyles and disease prevention.
events.image_alt: Community walk for World Health Day
